subtasks.title: Build strategy catalog model
subtasks.details: Define catalog entities for strategy name, version, risk profile, supported segments, and historical performance snapshot.
acceptance_criteria: Catalog API returns searchable strategy list.
Each strategy has immutable version identity.
questions: Need approval workflow before strategy becomes visible?

subtasks.title: Implement subscription workflow
subtasks.details: Allow users to subscribe/unsubscribe and configure strategy-specific parameters with validation.
acceptance_criteria: Subscription state persists and is auditable.
Invalid configuration is rejected with useful message.
questions: Can one user subscribe multiple variants of same strategy?

subtasks.title: Implement paper-live mode guardrails
subtasks.details: Require explicit confirmation and broker readiness checks before enabling live mode.
acceptance_criteria: Live mode blocked if broker credentials or risk limits are missing.
questions: Do we require cooling period between mode switches?

subtasks.title: Create marketplace frontend UX
subtasks.details: Build strategy browsing, details page, subscription actions, and current-user strategy control panel.
acceptance_criteria: Marketplace page loads strategy metadata and status.
Users can pause/resume strategies without page refresh.
questions: Need ranking by returns, drawdown, or popularity?
